title: parathelypteris noveboracensis
intro: Parathelypteris noveboracensis, also known as New York fern or New York lady fern, is a species of fern native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Parathelypteris noveboracensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical application, and is often used in herbal preparations for its therapeutic benefits.
